announcement.title: 🍁 Happy Canada Day — pager rotation cancelled (today only)
announcement.body: Coast-to-coast 2x rewards. The runbook has been maple-glazed. Even your Sysadmin is taking the long weekend. Bonus: limited-time Canada Day pack on the Shop tab — sorry for the inconvenience, eh?

shop.title: Canada Day Pack
shop.description: Maple-glazed bundle for the long weekend. 1000 💎 gems, 100 ✦ shards, 5 🎫 access cards. One-time per account.
